summary: Excellent audience recording of what many consider the best show of the summer tour.
review: The reviewer hails this performance as possibly the best show of the summer tour and praises the audio as the best available, noting a clear and well‑balanced audience capture. Both the musical set and the sound quality receive strong commendations.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic review highlights both an outstanding show and a top‑tier audience recording, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience recording described as good sounding and the best available copy, indicating clear capture with minimal issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer does not detail set structure but emphasizes overall excellence of the performance.
